feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Master Data Governance
feed.subtitle: SAP Master Data Governance Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP MDG Integration with CDQ
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on SAP MDG integration with CDQ system to Look Up and Create the BP. In S/4 HANA 2023, this integration is available out of the box. But, I am looking for options to integrate it in MDG Classic mode. Can someone help to identify the options available for MDG-CDQ integration in Classic mode. We are on S/4 HANA 2023 version.

entry.title: How to transfer MASTER RECIPE with MIC inside from ECC to S4HANA through Idoc
entry.content:
Hi all.

I am trying to migrate PP data from ECC to S4HANA and have a lot of issues of MASTER RECIPE (not Routing). I established the connection between both systems, I have created partner profile and distribution model. I am using message type LOIROU (it seems this is only support for Routing, please clarify me if I am wrong).

Idoc generated successfully and sent from ECC to S4HANA but cannot post. I checked the IDOC sent from ECC and found that some information are missed  such as MIC in each phase, no destination. I wonder that whether SAP support for MASTER RECIPE or NOT. Most of answer in this community is solved for ROUTING only. Need your help to clarify me how to transfer, what message type.... I saw that LTMC template of MASTER RECIPE not include MIC inside and though that SAP is not support for MASTER RECIPE.

Please help. Thank you.

entry.title: Delta IDOCs for Material Master using MDG DRF with ALE
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using MDG DRF with ALE IDOCS for Material Master. We are exploring the possibility of sending only delta IDOCs (i.e. Idocs with delta changes in Materials) instead of sending full material every time it is replicated out from MDG.

We are using standard outbound implementations for Materials and Classification. The configuration for outbound parameter SEND_DELTA_INFO doesn't seem to work.

Any pointers for the same or if anyone has successfully implemented this scenario then would really appreciate guidance on the same.

Thanks

Anuj

entry.title: Material Master - Mass changes in S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content:
Dear all,

My company plans on installing Master Data Governance next year. However, by the time we get the hand on the module, we'll have to deal with mass changes (no creation, only modification) in Material Master for all type of data in the opened views.

As such, do you know if S/4 Hana gives us such possiblity (native options) ? Correct me if I'm wrong about the existing options :

- MM17 still exists in S/4 Hana but requires that that all data for the materials and organizational levels you select should be the same

- Does LTMC gives you the possiblity to do mass changes on all type of data ?

If you have any other recommendation, I'll be more than happy to read it.

Yours sincerely,

entry.title: Email id issue in the contact person UIBB in MDG.
entry.content:
The data flowing from form UIBB to List UIBB in customer master data. After entering the required data in the contact person including email and after clicking on done, the email id from the form uibb is not flowing to the list UIBB of the contact person in the overview page.

If anyone faced similar data flow issue please help me to get the solution.

Regards,
Shabari.

entry.title: SAP MDG: How to make enable custom entity grey items in - Create Customer Search (HANA) ?
entry.content:
Hi 

Facing issue in choosing field grey check while create search view for Customer Search (HANA)

 

Thank You, 
Sowmya Surekha.

entry.title: Custom List entity using REUSE mode in sap MDG-S?
entry.content:
We have requirement to add Custom list entity using Reuse mode in MDG-S. we have the data mode extensions, genil Extensions and SMT mapping and brought Custom ENTITY in MDG UI. 

 

Issue is : - when we entered the data inside the custom entity UIBB. once Change request is Activated then data which we entered in the UIBB is getting Vanished and not getting updated in the Custom database table.

 

Kindly Help with Solution and Links.

 

Thanks in Advance

best Answer will be Rewarded.

entry.title: Email for Contact Person list uibb
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a scenario as below and request to guide me on the same.

User is trying to create the CR for the MDG-C.

We have custom list uibb for contact person inturn it is allowed to feed the details in the form uibb.

In the form uibb, we add the email id and when we navigate to list uibb, the email id value disappears.

Request to guide me on the same.

Option tried as below.

1. We have checked the feeder class of the list uibb IF_FPM_GUIBB_LIST~GET_DATA, email flows in the CT_DATA but not appearing in the list uibb

Attached the screens for form and list uibb, request to guide me on the same. Thanks.

2. We have checked the value of ev_data_changed  which is true.

3. Feeder class is created on top of super class CL_BS_BP_GUIBB_RELATIONS

form uibb :

list uibb :

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: SAP MDG DQM Derivations for custom fields
entry.content:
Is there a way to apply SAP MDG DQM Derivation rules for custom fields? I can't find / see any custom fields in the condition fields. I am able to create validation rules for custom fields but not derivations. Is this not supported? 

SAP Master Data Governance

entry.title: Hide Save Button from Global toolbar in MDG
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to hide Save button from global toolbar in MDG. I've created an implicit enhancement in CL_USMD_CR_MASTER~IF_FPM_GUIBB_FORM~GET_DATA. 

I'm trying to change the ENABLED (blank) and VISIBILITY (01) of the CR_SAVE of the ct_action_usage. The value seems changing in debugging, but the button is still visible and working.

Can anyone let me know what I'm missing or is there any other way to achieve this. Kindly let me know.

Thanks!

 

Regards,

Akhil

entry.title: MDG BP search result list enhancement
entry.content:
Hi guys,

we want to see the BP_ROLE in the BP search result list. Is there a way to achieve this?

We allready had a look at the Component Customizing for the search result list but there is no BP_ROLE. Any ideas how to bring it there?

entry.title: SAP MDG: Material - Hyperlink for Standard Fields Not Working
entry.content:
HI Folks 🙂

Hope You Guys are doing great 

Occurred with issue in Hyperlink - for Data Model MM

Problem is for standard fields only - Hyperlink (Not navigating to specific field)not working, but Error Messages & Information things are working. 

Looking forward for this solution Or Any Clues to get fix 

 

Thanks,  

Tarun.

entry.title: Staging table entry not created
entry.content:
Hi All,

As part of the requirement for adding JV attributes to profit center(JV attributes selected using OVS help in a custom form UIBB), made the changes and new staging table is created, but entry is not created in the table. However, the existing staging tables entries created (PCTR check table).

Could you please have a look and let me know if am missing anything that needs to be checked for table entry creation.

 

 

regards

Chandra.

entry.title: Archived MDG Change Request isn't listed in "Display Change Requests" app
entry.content:
We need to archive MDG change requests and followed following sources:

Data Archiving in MDG | SAP Help Portal

https://me.sap.com/notes/2574330

Archiving and deletion of change requests in SAP M... - SAP Community

We also activated SAP_USMD_CR with tcode SARI.

We then use the tcode SARA to ‘Write' the relevant CR. In this situation, the change request is still available in the MDG applications and in the USMD120C table.

After ‘Delete’ and completing the archiving session, the data is no longer displayed in the ‘Display Change Requests’ app. In "Archive Administration: Archive File Detail" I get following information:

I tried different variants but never got an archived CR back in the Display Change Requests app. And added a sign at "Include Archived Change Requests".

Following questions

- Where can I configure the app so that it can access the corresponding archive files?

- Is this a system error?

entry.title: SAP MDG How do I detect if I am copying a plant( from code)
entry.content:
Hi!

I need to change derivation logic for MDG-M depending on if I am creating plant data from scratch or copying an existing one. 

Could I retrieve in any way if I am creating or copying? I did not find any referring to that in context data.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP MDG CR- Hide Finalize processing and other buttons for unauthorized users
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently, when a change request is pending the approver and another user without the approver role open the CR, they are able to view the below buttons. 

I wish to hide these buttons for the users who don't have the current work items assigned.

Currently, the other users are able to view the buttons but on clicking it, the error message "You are currently not the processor of change request" is displayed. 

Please help me resolve this issue as I am new to MDG.

 

Thanks,

Thomas

entry.title: SAP MDG: Composite UIBB - List to List Possible ?
entry.content:
Hi SCN People, 

While i was trying to create wiring - Port Type not accepting 

 

Thank You, 

Suggu Sandeep.

entry.title: New MDG implementation for supplier module - Restriction based on BU group or alternate solutions
entry.content:
We have a new MDG implementation for supplier module and would like to restrict different groups of users with "Account Group" (In search) and also in "Manage Supplier" -> Select ‘New’ > "Organization" > "X– Create Supplier" to specific "Business Partner id/group".


Looking at the B_BUPA_GRP authorization object, it doesn't check for these BP BU groups. We did set some groups in "Maintain Authorization Groups " but are there any other steps to configure so the authorization checks are performed for B_BUPA_GRP.


If we would like to go with restriction for display/change/create based on "BU Groups", is it only done by custom development?
Is there any other suggestion to go with data visibility restriction of BP’s? And also to create change requests for specific groups?

entry.title: Create Synthetic data in lower environments
entry.content:
Hello All,

Due to customer center sensitive, we cannot copy production data to the lower environments such as quality and SIT systems, and testing in lower system's is causing lot of trouble as we aren't having proper test data.

We need to create some synthetic data in SIT and quality systems, based on the data we have in production without copying it. Is there any possibility of this?

Eg: G/L Accounts and cost centers should be created with same configuration of Production system, but it shouldn't be a copy of them.

Any pointers will be helpful.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: Created By-ERNAM field issue MDG-M
entry.content:
Hello,


We have an issue while we are creating material via MDG system. The field of 'created by' is given automatically from workflow user SAP_WFRT. 

Is there any solution to change this with actual user who create the change request.

 

 

The system component versions:
SAP S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2023
MDG_APPL 808


Kind regards,
Nedim
